summary: Completed testing of deal update flow, lead-deal linkage, and mobile responsiveness for Tasks/Customers pages. All requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: LeadDetailPage loads with pipeline status buttons (Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Sales Closed, Lost)
LeadDetailPage shows DEALS section with count and total value (e.g., DEALS (1) Total: RM 50,000)
Deal selection is mandatory before saving pipeline update - validation message shown
Pipeline status update works - selected deal, changed to Proposal, saved successfully
Deal stage updates in LeadDetailPage sidebar after save (shows 'Proposal' badge)
Activity Timeline logs the status update with deal name (Status updated to Proposal - Deal: Software License Deal)
Pipeline page shows deal in correct column (Proposal column) after update from LeadDetailPage
Tasks page mobile (375x812): Table has overflow-x-auto, visible columns: COMPANY NAME, PIPELINE
Tasks page mobile: Hidden columns on small screens: NO., PIC NAME, DEAL, COMMENTS, DATE & TIME, PAYMENT
Customers page mobile (375x812): Table has overflow-x-auto, visible columns: COMPANY NAME, STATUS
Customers page mobile: Hidden columns on small screens: PIC/DOCTOR, ROLE, MOBILE, EMAIL
Backend API tests: 11/11 passed - deals, leads, activities, tasks, customers CRUD
critical_code_review_comments: LeadDetailPage.jsx line 340-358: handleUpdateStatus properly updates deal stage via PUT /api/deals/{id}
LeadDetailPage.jsx line 163-165: fetchDeals filters by linked_company_ids OR lead_id - correctly fetches linked deals
Tasks.jsx line 377-388: Table uses responsive classes (hidden sm:table-cell, hidden md:table-cell, hidden lg:table-cell)
Customers.jsx line 321-330: Table uses responsive classes to show essential columns only on mobile
Both tables have min-w-[600px] or min-w-[800px] and overflow-x-auto for horizontal scrolling
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: Test Clinic 1, Software License Deal. Created test customer for mobile view testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deal flow fully tested: 1) Go to LeadDetailPage -> select deal from dropdown -> change pipeline status -> save -> deal stage updates in sidebar and on Pipeline page. 2) Mobile responsiveness verified for Tasks (375x812): shows COMPANY NAME, PIPELINE columns; hides NO., PIC NAME, DEAL, COMMENTS, DATE & TIME, PAYMENT. 3) Mobile responsiveness verified for Customers: shows COMPANY NAME, STATUS; hides PIC/DOCTOR, ROLE, MOBILE, EMAIL. Both tables have horizontal scroll. Test credentials: test@test.com / Password123!

features_verified.activity_timeline_logging: Working - Logs status updates with deal name
features_verified.tasks_mobile_responsive: Working - Columns hide appropriately, horizontal scroll enabled
features_verified.customers_mobile_responsive: Working - Essential columns visible, others hidden on mobile
